title: papaver rhoeas var. dubium
intro: Papaver rhoeas var. dubium, also known as the lesser or Welsh poppy, is a variety of the common poppy plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it effective in treating pain and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Papaver rhoeas var. dubium include its potential to aid in the treatment of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and effectiveness.
